mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.email as email FROM comments as c LEFT JOIN users as u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE is_deleted IS NULL AND c.post_id = #{post_id} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{post_id}, #{user_id}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET is_deleted=now() WHERE comment_id = #{comment_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE is_deleted IS NULL
